100% Slots Welcome Bonus

How to Participate:

  1. Register an account with us.
  2. Perform a deposit and click “Join Now”.
  3. Enter the desired amount to join.
  4. Bonus up to INR 1,00,000 will be processed once details are verified.

Terms & Conditions:

  1. Players must fulfill the required turnover requirement in order to transfer or withdraw.
  2. Wager must be met within 30 days or the remaining amount shall expire.
  3. Please note, the wager/ bets placed directly from the bonus wallet only will be contributing towards the wagering target. 
  4. Players can cancel the promotion after fulfilling the turnover requirement.
  5. All bets placed shall use the player deposited amount first before using the bonus amount.
  6. In case of early termination, the full deposit + bonus amount will be invalid and won't be returned to the user.
  7. This promotion cannot be used in conjunction with any other promotional offer.
  8. Draw, refund, void, bets on two opposite sides, and bets on non-participating products will not count as a valid turnover.
  9. For winning bets only the profit from the bet will be considered towards wagering.
  10. Only one account per player is allowed.
  11. Players opening multiple or fraudulent accounts will be disqualified from the promotion. The remaining amount could be forfeited and the account shall be frozen.
  12. We reserve the right to modify, alter, discontinue, cancel, refuse or void this promotion at its sole discretion.
  13. Participating players must accept and comply with the terms of this promotion.
  14. Terms & Conditions apply.
  15. The bonus amount will be converted to real money not exceeding the original provided bonus amount.

Losing Bonus

To be eligible for losing bonus you need to meet the following requirements:

  • Meet minimum wagering/betting requirements on your account.
  • Play regularly or continuously on the platform and deposit more to become a VIP user.
  • No duplicate accounts on the platforms will be accepted and will lead to immediate termination of the account.
